summary: Raw, handheld vertical phone footage of travelers with luggage trudging through crowded airport corridors at George Bush Intercontinental, carrying an Instagram watermark crediting '@NICOLECBS' (a reshared user/news clip). DHS reposts it to blame Democrats for long TSA lines and pressure them to fund DHS. It is not produced youth-appeal content: there is no genre styling, music-video editing, title cards, slogans, or animated branding, just lightly-edited borrowed footage used as an informational/political talking point.
notable_text: Democrats must END this chaos and fund DHS.
